free_text: (d,p) and (d,a) reactions on S-34 for 6.6 MeV
spectrometer were used to detect reaction products.
GeS film with the thickness of 70-80 mu-g/cm2
enriched in S-34 to 98% was used as a target. The
thickness of carbon backing was 20 mu-g/cm2.
Sensitive area was up to 800 mu-m.
